Matsumura Goshun

2 works in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Scenes from Essays in Idleness
by Matsumura Goshun
Japan, Edo period (1615–1868) · late 1700s–early 1800s · Pair of six-panel folding screens; ink and color on paper
Seventy-Two Peaks Under the Blue Sky with Mount Furong
by Matsumura Goshun
Japan, Edo period (1615–1868) · 1785 · Eight-panel folding screen; ink with gold and silver foil on paper
